“God Reveals So We Can Heal” 🕊️

God reveals what’s hidden deep,
the wounds we try to hide,
not to shame the broken places—
but to heal what’s inside.

He brings the truth into the light
where pain can find release,
and what once felt like chaos
becomes the path to peace.
